name: Deva Holding A.S.
summary: Deva Holding A.S. manufactures and sells pharmaceutical products in Turkey. The company provides antineoplastic and immunomodulating agents; dermatological products; sysyemic hormanal preparations; anti-infective and antiparasitic products for systemic use; food supplements; and electrolyte solutions. It also offers products in the areas of urogenital system and sex hormones, blood and blood forming organs, cardiovascular system, musculoskeletal system, nervous system, alimentary tract and metabolism, respiratory system, and sensory organs. In addition, the company offers animal health products and active pharmaceutical ingredients, eye drops, medical ampoules for sterile injectable products, and cologne. It also exports its products to approximately 60 countries. The company was founded in 1958 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Deva Holding A.S. is a subsidiary of EastPharma SARL.
